sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_points (id Int32, lon Float64, lat Float64, name String);
INSERT INTO geo_points VALUES (4, NULL, NULL, 'Point D');
SELECT id, greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, (SELECT MAX(lon) FROM geo_points), (SELECT MAX(lat) FROM geo_points)) / 2 AS half_angle FROM geo_points;
SELECT name, greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, lon + 360, lat + NULL) AS adjusted_angle FROM geo_points WHERE lat IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, greatCircleAngle(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) / greatCircleAngle(lon2, lat2, lon1, lat1) AS ratio FROM (SELECT lon AS lon1, lat AS lat1 FROM geo_points WHERE id = 1) AS a, (SELECT lon AS lon2, lat AS lat2 FROM geo_points WHERE id = 2) AS b;
WITH (SELECT greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, lon + 180, lat + 90) AS full_rotation FROM geo_points) AS angles SELECT COUNT(*) FROM angles WHERE full_rotation > 180;
SELECT lon, lat, greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, lon + 1.0, lat + 1.0) / NULLIF(greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, 0, 0), 0) AS angle_ratio FROM geo_points WHERE lon BETWEEN -180 AND 180;
